description_long: This upright piano features a rectangular, vertical body with a matte black finish, typical of many urban and studio pianos. The front displays a full keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and two gold-colored pedals are visible at the base. The top section is solid and flat, with no visible music stand or decorative elements. The sides are straight and unadorned, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The back is plain and featureless, consistent with pianos designed to be placed against a wall. The overall construction suggests a robust wooden frame, likely reinforced with metal components internally for string tension and durability.
description: A matte black upright piano with a full keyboard and two gold pedals, featuring a simple, robust design and flat top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, two gold pedals, and the flat, unadorned top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the piano's depth, vertical profile, and the protruding keyboard section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, solid back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the keyboard and pedal alignment, with the flat top and solid side panel.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard layout with 52 white keys and 36 black keys arranged in alternating groups, typical of an 88-key piano.
